programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raneys take on a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse. Marty overhauls the base of the cabin, and Misty builds a greenhouse out of scavenged windows. Matt adds pm a workshop for making leather goods.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap
programme.desc: The Jackson family in Idaho suffers from a cabin on the verge of collapse and a predator threat for 100 chickens. The Raneys use all new ingenuity to make the cabin livable, protect the flock and create a valuable income source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homestead of Horrors
programme.desc: A nightmare in North Carolina. A couple that is terrified to hunt and a ramshackle home with exposed wires in the shower and chickens in the living room. The Raneys have never seen a homestead like this.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Global Game Show: Fun & Games
programme.desc: John challenges contestants, at the Highland Games in Scotland, to test their knowledge and then competes with them in physical skills game.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: The surge of human activity surrounding the discovery of an ancient city sends Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot deep in the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster that has been terrifying locals for centuries.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Realm of the Caiman
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to Brazil to encounter the Yacare Caiman. As he swims alongside them in piranha-infested waterways, he studies their perfect-predator personality as jaguars and capybara lurk from the shoreline.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Shadow of the Jaguar
programme.desc: Coyote demonstrates how capturing elusive big cats on film is a near-impossible task, but with technological advancements such as trail cameras, nature enthusiasts can see predators like jaguars up close in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Dozer Dave Returns
programme.desc: Dave Turin, a former 'Gold Rush' miner, sets out on his own prospecting for an abandoned gold mine to reopen. When an investor backs out, Dave has to decide if he's willing to risk his family's life savings on his ability to bring home the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: Dozer Dave bets his life savings that he can unearth piles of gold from an abandoned mine using salvaged equipment and a team of amateur miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery
programme.desc: Dave faces a nightmare scenario when the ground he's mining goes cold and no one knows why. With his season hanging in the balance, the pressure mounts for Dave to get them back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: The Stench Is Amazing

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Leading a Double Life

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Looks Bad, Feels Worse

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A Humongous Secret

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: They're Crawling!

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brianne's Story

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Free the Chi Chi’s
programme.desc: Jeremiah and Mattie take their relationship to the next level. The roommates discover that propane, matches and the 4th of July aren't a good mix. Kortni returns to the house with her past following. An innocent night out turns into jail time.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: There’s No Pizza in Jail

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Bad Day at the Beach
programme.desc: Jeremiah's lack of communication frustrates everyone and drives Mattie away. A casual card game leads to an epic baby birding. Jeremiah tells the roommates that his brother Josh is coming for a visit, and no one is pleased by the news.

programme.title: Floribama Shore: All This Over A Flower

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Lessons of the Past
programme.desc: Winter's arrival means the people of Tanana must focus on the dangerous and potentially lucrative process of trapping, but the invading force of outside hunters are stealing from the lines.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Burnt Offerings
programme.desc: An early cold front puts the entire village at risk and two homesteaders have a risky plan to survive the deep freeze.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Life's Balance
programme.desc: The countdown to the dark days of winter causes a mad dash for resources among the residents of Tanana which exposes the villagers to greater risk.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Running on Empty
programme.desc: As resources for winter run low in the village of Tanana, villagers are forced to find new ways to survive. With ambitious projects come potentially dangerous results.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Banding Together
programme.desc: Villagers join forces in a desperate fight to bring vital resources into the town. While necessary for survival, the task is also a costly distraction from hunting.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: The Code of Honor
programme.desc: A devastating winter rolls in, threatening several homesteaders and their food supply. The influx of hunters coming off the main road also threatens provisions and the old way of life.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodiles of the Revolution
programme.desc: In East Timor, the Australian Army discovered two crocodiles living in appalling conditions. Steve and his team from Australia Zoo are called to undertake a death-defying crocodile rescue.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Little Lion Pups
programme.desc: A bullmastiff puppy sticks to his aunt's side as he tries to follow in her footsteps and become a guard dog. A pair of lowchen pups seek out additional family members. An old English sheepdog finds himself being herded by his tiny sister.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Cats in Isolation
programme.desc: Jackson deals with four cats that are constantly at each other's throats; the Cat Daddy visits the Living Free Animal Sanctuary's cattery where territorial issues have forced two cats to live in isolation for years.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Tiger's Tale
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff gives hope to a concerned owner when their dog is diagnosed with cancer. The team cares for a litter of abandoned kittens. Dr. Amy solves the mystery of a beloved cat's painful injury. And Dr. Jeff and Hector help a rescued tiger find love.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Dr. Blue Gets Tanked
programme.desc: Dr. Blue's love of fish has him wanting a home aquarium. Dr. Ross attempts to diagnose Layla, a Lab with bizarre test results, while Dr. Lavigne performs knee surgery on a bulldog. A lamb, headed to the county fair, suddenly has breathing problems.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Eyes
programme.desc: It's a big day for Hunter the Sumatran Tiger. He is blind and must be sedated for his annual eye check, allowing Terri to get closer than usual. The keepers prepare the young giraffe Scarlett for a road trip to South Australia, reuniting her with family.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Otterly Love
programme.desc: Otter couple Diego and Icana are best friends but have never mated, so keepers decide to replace Diego with a new male Tarubu. They hope that young Tarubu will relight Icana's fire and that they will provide Chester with long awaited otter pups.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Different Mission
programme.desc: Earl takes the lead in restoring an abandoned Rottweiler to health. A service dog organization from North Carolina reaches out to Villalobos searching for a new dog for their program. M2 goes on her second rescue, taking in an owner surrender.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Tip of the Iceberg
programme.desc: After Tia and Sugar rescue a stray, they are shocked by what they find and race him to the vet. New worker Darius pursues his dream of working in the veterinary field. And an empty nester heads to Villalobos looking for a new companion.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Virginia
programme.desc: A struggling single mother leads a movement to change the school system and create scholarship programs for her at risk teenage son and others like him.

programme.title: Movie: Fruitvale Station
programme.desc: The story of Oscar Grant III, a defenceless young man who was killed by Bay Area police on December 31, 2008.

programme.title: Movie: Creed
programme.desc: When the son of his late friend decides to enter the world of boxing, Former Heavyweight Champion Rocky Balboa volunteers to serve as his trainer and mentor.

programme.title: Martin: Baby It's Cole'd Here
programme.desc: Cole's mother interrupts his evening with his girlfriend and demands back rent from him.

programme.title: Martin: Radio Days
programme.desc: Stan decides to hire a new female co-host for Martin's show to boost the ratings. At first Martin feels threatened by the move, and is very stand-offish.

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever
programme.desc: When Martin returns to his elementary school for Career Day, he discovers his favourite third grade teacher, Ms. Trinidad, is still teaching there. As they catch up, she makes a pass at Martin while Gina watches.

programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home

programme.desc: Trying to lose weight, Philip has a heart attack after eating a cheeseburger 'treat.'

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Take My Cousin - Please

programme.desc: Nikki helps Professor Oglevee assemble a winning team so he can beat his long-time rival.

programme.title: Black-ish: Bow Knows
programme.desc: Dre is selected to run point on a campaign that focuses on 'The Talk,' which refers to the conversations that Black parents have with their children through the decades to prepare them for the racial bias they may face in the world.

programme.title: Black-ish: Unkept Woman
programme.desc: Dre and Bow's morning routine with the kids is changing now that Bow is taking some time off work. Meanwhile, Junior bonds with Diane now that he is in charge of driving his siblings to school.

programme.title: Black-ish: R-E-S-P-E-C-T
programme.desc: Dre and Bow confront gender biases of their own after finding out that both Junior and Zoey have become sexually active. Meanwhile, Ruby is hurt when she finds out that Jack and Diane have been hanging out with a friend's grandmother after school.

programme.title: Black-ish: White Breakfast
programme.desc: When Jack and Diane get in trouble at school, Dre and Bow have to figure out the right balance of discipline and support so that their kids aren't too afraid of authority nor feel entitled.

programme.title: Black-ish: Things Were Different Then
programme.desc: Dre reluctantly helps Junior plan Pops' 65th birthday party and starts to see his dad's past in a new light. Meanwhile, Bow decides to say "yes" to everything for a whole year and Jack and Diane take advantage of her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Math
programme.desc: When Junior is accepted to Howard and Stanford, Dre tries to convince him to attend his alma mater. Meanwhile, Jack develops a comedy style and Ruby decides she's going to manage his career, forcing Diane to compete for her attention.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dog Eat Dog World
programme.desc: The family is divided over the idea of getting a dog after Dre and Bow promise Jack they can get one after he gets Straight A's and he does. Meanwhile, Bow's brother Johan is in town and he doesn't get the warm welcome he expects from Ruby.

programme.title: Black-ish: Fifty-Three Percent
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have been fighting more than usual and they decide to go back to their therapist who suggests they make time for a date night. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane take advantage of Devante's bouncy house in different kinds of ways.

programme.title: Movie: Skyfall
programme.desc: The charming James Bond faces another challenging situation as M deals with her power being threatened. Past events are revealed, as James Bond is possibly the only agent able to help M through this troubling time as action-packed attacks wage on.

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: Two Months to the Altar
programme.desc: Kim Zolciak is getting married and is planning a million-dollar wedding in just 8 weeks. Celebrity wedding planner Colin Cowie promises to turn her backyard into the winter wonderland wedding of her fantasies.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: How to Dress a Bride in Six Weeks
programme.desc: Kim works out with Kroy's trainer in an attempt to slim down for her newly purchased size 2 designer wedding gown and slips off to NYC to look for a second dress.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: The Biermanns Are Coming
programme.desc: Kroy's parents, whom Kim has only met once, are coming for a week-long visit, and according to Psychic Rose, they aren't thrilled about the impending nuptials between Kim and their son.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: At the Fifty Yard Line
programme.desc: Kim and Kroy lay down the rules as Brielle gets ready for her first Homecoming dance. Frustrated with her mom's behaviour, Kim un-invites her from the food tasting with Colin Cowie, to some unexpected and disastrous results.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: Port-a-Pology
programme.desc: Kroy surprises Kim, when he tells his wish for them to write their own vows for the ceremony, which will be officiated by former Falcons linebacker Coy Wire. Kim picks out luxury port-a-potties with Derek J, whereas Jen shirks her duties.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: Maid of Dishonour
programme.desc: Between major mistakes made with her ceremony prep and Kim's Matron of Honour, Jen, not living up to her matronly duties, Kim is sent into an emotional tailspin just days before the wedding.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: One Wig Left to Go
programme.desc: To keep wedding crashers out, Kim and Kroy enlist armed guards and attack dogs. Kim gets sick the day before the wedding, but Kroy surprises her with some bling. Kim agrees to show her real hair to Derek J and Niki.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: Our Wedding Goes to 11 ... 11 ... 11
programme.desc: With only a few hours to go, Colin and Derek are still working on Kim's wedding and wig. Kim's assistant Niki steps in as Matron of Honour.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: We Fly Above
programme.desc: Nerves continue to fray as guests arrive, including paparazzi in helicopters. Kim is swept up in the emotion of being a bride, but her special day turns cloudy when her mom starts making demands.

programme.desc: A brutal attack leaves a witness to murder. But when the police find the killer, turns out the intended victim, and the motive, were not what anyone imagined.

programme.title: Snapped: Vegas Bray
programme.desc: An attractive woman witnesses her ex-boyfriend’s shooting, but can’t remember what happened, raising questions about suicide, stalking and split personalities.

programme.desc: A farmer husband and wife are brutally murdered, setting off an investigation that exposes a startling motive fueled by lust and desperation.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Widowed Witness
programme.desc: A brutal attack leaves a witness to murder. But when the police find the killer, turns out the intended victim, and the motive, were not what anyone imagined.

programme.title: Snapped: Emma Raine
programme.desc: The family of a former soldier questions whether or not his death was a tragic coincidence when they learn of a suspicious detail from his wife's past.

programme.title: Snapped: Kim Long
programme.desc: A vicious attack leaves a man dead and his girlfriend under suspicion, but is there enough evidence to prove murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Toxic
programme.desc: Kevin and Morgan Mengel were happy at first, but when the marriage went bad, he went missing. Police wondered if he simply left, but a family's relentless pursuit lead to a stunning confrontation and, eventually, the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: On a quiet morning in 2008, a blaze burns a country home to the ground. A mom and wife are found dead, but officials say it wasn't the fire that killed her. It takes years to unravel the mystery of that home and the couple that once lived inside.

programme.title: Dateline: Who Killed the Radio Star
programme.desc: Radio DJ Steven B. Williams was found dead off the coast of Catalina Island, Calif. The clue that led police to his murderer was tucked away where no one would ever look.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Sister's Search
programme.desc: Aasha Davis moved to Hollywood with big dreams. Her sister Lesley followed for support. Then, Lesley went missing and Aasha was desperate to find her. In a town built on deception, police came up with a high-stakes plan to smoke out their suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Halloween Moon
programme.desc: It was just before Halloween. Joel Lovelien and his fiancé headed to a local bar packed with people in costume. Then, Joel stepped outside and walked into a troubling mystery. Police rounded up potential suspects, but could they unmask a killer?

programme.title: The Witnesses: The Watchtower
programme.desc: After receiving leaked documents reporter Trey Bundy sets out to expose a cover up of child sexual abuse among the Jehovah's Witnesses. When he meets abuse survivors and an attorney fighting for justice he learns the conspiracy goes much deeper.

programme.title: The Witnesses: A Window for Justice
programme.desc: Trey's investigation leads him to a survivor whose own family helped hide her abuse. Another survivor reveals evidence that may trace back to a top Jehovah's Witnesses leader. Victims get an overdue shot at justice in New York State.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Ransom
programme.desc: It began with a young mom abducted at gunpoint. Her family and veteran investigators spent desperate days trying to find out where she was but they never could have guessed who had her and why.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Somebody’s Daughter
programme.desc: Detectives often hit dead ends that can stop them cold but, for one young detective, dead ends were just another place to start. She'd beaten the odds in her own life. Now, she was determined to beat them on the job using her head and her heart.

programme.title: Movie: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: When Tim gets a younger brother, named The Boss Baby, he is suspicious of the suit-wearing baby. He discovers that his brother can talk, and is on a mission to investigate the CEO of Puppy Co. Together, they discover a plot to steal all the world's love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets Famous
programme.desc: Bart is launched into instant stardom with Krusty the Klown after wrecking the set.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All About Lisa

programme.title: The Simpsons: Faith Off
programme.desc: When Homer gets his head stuck in a bucket of glue, the family attempts to save him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa With An 'S"

programme.title: The Simpsons: Jazzy and the Pussycats

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girl's in the Band

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monsters of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The center of the Milky Way is home to strange and deadly phenomena that we don't yet understand, but using the latest science, experts are revealing how the supermassive black hole our galaxy's core shapes life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Mercury
programme.desc: Mercury is a deadly world, facing attacks from the Sun, comets, and other planets, and even though it's the smallest planet in our solar system, it has a dangerous secret a dangerous secret that might one day threaten life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Comets - Frozen Wanderers
programme.desc: Follow the odyssey of a comet as it sails through space, watching every move as it evolves from a chunk of ice and rock into an active nucleus engulfed in a gaseous haze.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Alien Galaxies
programme.desc: The evolution of galaxies, from clouds of gas to magnificent spirals that fill our night.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Forces of Mass Construction
programme.desc: There's a mysterious force you can't see or touch, but it affects everything in the universe. Magnetism has shaped our cosmos, and without it, Creation would simply disintegrate. We follow scientists trying to understand how this strange force works.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: Crime 360: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Det. Mocello responds to the scene of a suspicious fire in the bedroom of a first-floor apartment. He soon discovers that the deceased victim's charred body has sustained serious trauma.

programme.title: Crime 360: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A coroner finds that a victim's body shows signs of blunt force trauma to the head.

programme.title: City Confidential: Milwaukee: The Legend of Bambi Bembenek

programme.title: City Confidential: Atlantic City
programme.desc: This East Coast gambling mecca is not without its mob problems.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carthage: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: The residents of a Texas town are stunned when a well-liked citizen is accused of murder.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carlsbad: Danger in the Desert
programme.desc: Johnny Volpato, a popular politician and pharmacist, was accused of shooting his wife.

programme.title: Crime 360: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: Cutting edge forensics are used to solve the case of a missing man who is believed to have been murdered by two brothers.

programme.title: Crime 360: At Death's Door
programme.desc: It's a race against time to identify a murder suspect before he disappears for good.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood on the Staircase
programme.desc: North Carolina author Michael Peterson was convicted of murdering his wife for her insurance money.

programme.title: American Justice: The Doctor's Wife
programme.desc: An affair between a doctor and his nurse leads to the deaths of himself and his wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 105 and Rising
programme.desc: It's a hot and humid night in New Orleans, and as temperatures rise, violence erupts. Police chase two carjacking suspects. Keeley treats an injured young family. Titus and Dan respond to a call from a former Playboy bunny.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City
programme.desc: For the men and women on the Nightwatch, two things never stop: the calls and the questions. The first responders do everything they can to save the victims of several shootings, a drug overdose and more.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: A Real Drag
programme.desc: After a violent boating accident, multiple agencies work to recover a boat, and possibly a body, from the murky depths of the Mississippi waters.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Grave Robbery
programme.desc: Detectives respond to a cemetery caretaker's complaint of several grave robberies.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Mardi Gras
programme.desc: Deputies work around the clock in Terrebonne Parish, which is home to the second biggest Mardi Gras in the state.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bayou Beasts
programme.desc: Lt. Peter Guidry is dispatched to a property full of man-made booby traps, including trip wires and bear traps, and a tied-up gator acting as the property's guard dog.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: The Great Swamp Escape
programme.desc: When expensive shrimping nets are stolen, a swamp chase ensues in which the culprit, Deputy Thibodeaux's nephew, manages to escape.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Gator Man's Law
programme.desc: Corporal Storm Fitch finds an abandoned car in the marsh just off an eerie and haunted bayou road.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Extortion
programme.desc: The Squad believes that prison gang members are running an extortion game when an inmate's family receives violent threats.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Shanked
programme.desc: An inmate with a shank sticking out of his stomach is rushed to the infirmary. Before losing consciousness, he gives the agents a lead on the case.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder
programme.desc: Theresa Wesolowski was murdered on May 29, 1999, leaving police baffled for nearly 10 years. They finally got a break in the case when a new DNA technique identified a co-worker, Mark Libecki, who was convicted of 1st degree murder in 2009.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Flowers in the Lake
programme.desc: Leesa Nascimento was murdered on July 6, 2010 by being shot in the head. A recently sacked co-worker, Lorenza Sam is traced after evidence was found that tied him to the murder and he was arrested. He was sentenced to Life in Prison without parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: After Kacie Woody discovers Internet chat rooms, the popular teen has her pick of high school hunks hoping to connect. The teen is exchanging IMs with her latest love interest, when a silver van creaks to a stop outside her house.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Unsafe Anywhere
programme.desc: 21 year old Joel Larson is shot to death in a safe haven community for gay people in 1990's Minneapolis. Two more shootings terrorize the community as they realize a serial killer in disguise lives among them.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Puzzle Piece
programme.desc: When the battered body of Bianca Rainer, mother of two young girls, is found in rural Arkansas, the police have just one unusual clue, a puzzle piece found stuck to her body. But they know if they find the missing puzzle, they will find her murderer.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Catfish Killer
programme.desc: After Kacie Woody discovers Internet chat rooms, the popular teen has her pick of high school hunks hoping to connect. The teen is exchanging IMs with her latest love interest, when a silver van creaks to a stop outside her house.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Unsafe Anywhere
programme.desc: 21 year old Joel Larson is shot to death in a safe haven community for gay people in 1990's Minneapolis. Two more shootings terrorize the community as they realize a serial killer in disguise lives among them.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Puzzle Piece
programme.desc: When the battered body of Bianca Rainer, mother of two young girls, is found in rural Arkansas, the police have just one unusual clue, a puzzle piece found stuck to her body. But they know if they find the missing puzzle, they will find her murderer.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Games of Homes
programme.desc: New neighbours disrupt the harmony that has existed between residents for years. Alliances change and terror reigns until a winter storm puts a bloody end to the feud.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Landlord, Death Lord
programme.desc: A young couple finds their paradise in a Vancouver, Washington housing development with strict codes of community conduct. But someone forgot to tell their neighbour the rules, and he will resist them at all costs.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: A wealthy executive comes into conflict with his neighbors when he forbids them access to his extensive lands. One local handyman fights to keep the roads and trails open for all, a struggle that ends when one man lies dead.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lies, Lawns & Murder
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a retired Vietnam veteran sells off a piece of his land to a young family. No one can predict the modern day Hatfield McCoy neighbor feud that will ensue and the midnight shootout that will end it.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bonfire of Blood
programme.desc: An argument about access to a disputed road puts two Lompico, California men at each other's throats. Things progress from intimidation and property damage to a backhoe attack and, finally, one of the most shocking murders the area has ever seen.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Home Alone
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Garrett Phillips is attacked while home alone; his killer jumps unseen from a window and investigators are left with a vexing mystery that rattles the village of Potsdam, New York.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: It Could Have Been Me
programme.desc: Two teenage girls fall for men who seem to care about them. Instead, the girls are lured into human trafficking and coerced into prostitution.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: The Vanishing Clerk
programme.desc: On an Easter Sunday, 18-year-old Heidi Allen vanishes from her convenience store job. Two brothers are arrested for the kidnapping, but only one is convicted. Years later, a chilling new story emerges implicating three other men in the crime.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Born to Sin
programme.desc: Adopted twins Peter and Michael Versluys are raised in a loving home. As time goes by, however, the boys reveal their inner dark side and their lives become full of failure and deceit. Ultimately, their twisted bond exposes the evil that lies within.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Honor Roll Killers
programme.desc: Twin sisters Jas and Tas Whitehead are the apple of their mother's eye. These beauties seem to have it all, until they turn from fun girls to belligerent teens. When their mother tries to set them on track, the twins push back with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Evil Twins: The Family Curse
programme.desc: Identical twins Jordan and Simon Gann had potential in their youth. But as teens they take a dark turn. Soon small lies and thievery give way to a global crime spree where the twins exploit the vulnerabilities of others in a cruel and twisted game.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mother of Evil
programme.desc: For identical twins Mark and Martin Stephens, life in a family of twins has been anything but normal. But one of them is more unusual than the others. And before long, someone close will learn just how deadly a lifetime of unrealized dreams can be.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: American Titans: Hearst vs. Pulitzer
programme.desc: In the late 1890s when William Randolph Hearst challenges the king of newspaper publishing Joseph Pulitzer in a high stakes circulation war, they change publishing forever by stopping at nothing to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud
programme.desc: The Everglades are home to bank robbers, rumrunners, and cold-blooded killers. Sheriff Bob Baker is determined to take down one of the most infamous and deadly gangs in Florida's history.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Was A Rough One
programme.desc: The Owens work to finish the roof, but multiple falling objects and whiteout conditions make the job perilous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Have Saw, Will Cut
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors only to find the frame fits incorrectly during installation. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Gotta Be Efficient
programme.desc: Jackie's team hears propane leaking somewhere in their cabin as they install the cabinets and stove. Melting trails makes the delivery of cabinets and appliances dangerous at the Owens' build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Most Amazing View
programme.desc: The teams continue to struggle as their build seasons come to a close. Jackie's team hurries to finish the interior of her cabin, while the Owens team is at risk of not finishing their client's cabin on time.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Moving on to Plan X-Ray
programme.desc: Josh and his team begin work on the interior walls and install the second-story floor joists in their Cordova cabin. At Trinity Lake, Chris must adapt when he runs out of lumber to build a dock and the framers he hired don't show up.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Up High Without a Net
programme.desc: Chris Maynard and team prepare for two intense helicopter deliveries of roof rafters and Greg precariously scales a raised rake wall to nail it into place. John and Heather are finishing the roof by installing insulation and metal sheeting.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.desc: Chris Maynard and team prepare for two intense helicopter deliveries of roof rafters and Greg precariously scales a raised rake wall to nail it into place. John and Heather are finishing the roof by installing insulation and metal sheeting.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Industrial-Modern in the OC
programme.desc: Back in his hometown, Matt finds a couple of new homeowners who have been renovating the inside of their fixer-upper and neglecting their backyard space. Matt and the gang transform the small space into an industrial-modern retreat with different 'rooms.'

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Batter Up!
programme.desc: A SWAT expert breaks out the force's battering ram for his and his girlfriend's first flip. They're off to a great start with the big guns, but it's the small tools that give them the most trouble during their West Palm Beach, Florida flip.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: From Tune-Up to Teardown
programme.desc: A young couple believes they have scored the deal of a lifetime when they acquire an old farmhouse for their first flip. They soon realize, however, that the house is beyond repair. They're left to rebuild from the ground up, risking everything they have.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: A Rotten Flip
programme.desc: A young couple discovers pest damage while flipping a four-bedroom bungalow in the seaside town of Newport, North Carolina. Fixing the rot is a major hit to their budget and adds to their never-ending list of projects.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: The Nails 'n the Coughin'
programme.desc: Lifelong friends set out to flip their first house together in their hometown of Overland, Missouri. While one has past experience renovating houses, the other is a total newbie.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Nashville Novices
programme.desc: Leland is flipping a house in his hometown of Nashville, Tennessee, and has asked his parents Evy and Bob to help him with the renovations. With Leland splitting time between California and Nashville, they struggle to complete the house on time.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Tropic Blunder
programme.desc: A mother-daughter team flips their first house on the beautiful island of Kauai, HI. While the flipping newbies have real estate experience, a surprise visit from a building inspector quickly gets them off track.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Minnehaha House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles a 1916 mansion in Minneapolis and builds out its dingy, old cellar by creating a new living space that adds nearly 1,000 square feet to the home. Then, Nicole indulges her most glamorous fantasy in the master suite.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 4th Street House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis takes on a boarded up, previously condemned 1880s duplex and restores it into a single-family home.

programme.title: Restored: Dutch Colonial Done Right
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1918 Dutch Colonial home in Upland, California for a woman moving back in with her mother. The family would like to see the house restored to its former glory. Brett quickly learns this house is a time capsule full of discoveries.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: The 1890 Yellow Shingle-Style Victorian
programme.desc: Brett strips away strange remodels and restores the beauty and functionality to a 1890s Victorian.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch
programme.desc: Brett opens up the floor plan of a 1950s mid-century ranch and makes the space more livable for a family of four while staying true to the original style.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzel-a, Queen of Dessert
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Crystal River, Florida, for the Florida Manatee Festival, where he tries the OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Atlanta
programme.desc: We're headed to Atlanta, one of the largest cities in the South, for some of the best things we ever ate. From barbecued rib tips and top-secret burgers, to 'angry' mussels that will make your day.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New England
programme.desc: We're in New England, the birthplace of the American Revolution, for some of our favourite food. We sample Boston cream pie, sticky buns, and Szechuan sliced fish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago may be famous for its architecture, but we're here for the food. We've got a deep love for Gino's deep dish pizza, and the pork rinds at Publican are some of the best ever. The classic Chicago dog at Weiner Circle can't be topped.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas
programme.desc: Discover some of the hottest spots in Dallas, Texas, from brisket to fried chicken.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Billings, MT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Billings, Montana, to tackle a one-hour steak challenge featuring a 78-ounce rib eye and two pounds of mashed potatoes, salad and bread.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Unstable

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Sugar
programme.desc: A woman's body is found in a suitcase and the detectives believe she was on her way to Tampa on the train. They look to her boyfriend for clues and answers and get led to an online dating site where the answers aren't forthcoming.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Feud
programme.desc: Phil is upset to have lost his elected office of social chair to his nemesis Gil Thorpe, and when he finds out Luke is competing against Gil's kid in a wrestling match, it becomes his own personal battle.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spring-a-Ding-Fling
programme.desc: Cameron is in charge of the school's spring dance, but when a popular teacher returns from sabbatical, a bit of not-so-friendly competition blooms. With Claire on chaperone duty at the dance, Phil gets Haley to accompany him to the realtor's banquet.

programme.title: Modern Family: Other People's Children
programme.desc: It's male-bonding day when Jay takes Luke into the garage to show him the way around tools and impart some manly wisdom, and Gloria goes with Claire and Lily to shop for Lily's flower girl dress.

programme.title: Modern Family: Las Vegas
programme.desc: The adults are Vegas-bound when Jay hooks them up with Excelsior Level hotel accommodations courtesy of one of his big clients, but after learning there's an even higher level, Jay becomes obsessed with upgrading.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Hard Jay's Night
programme.desc: Mitch struggles to hide his true feelings about the unflattering wedding topper Cam's father whittled out of soap for them. Phil tries to help Gloria sell her pre-Jay apartment, but they get sidetracked at the neighbourhood salon.

programme.title: Modern Family: Australia
programme.desc: The entire family tags along as Phil fulfills his mom's wish for him to return to his roots and visit the country where he was conceived: Australia. Unfortunately, Phil's attempts to embrace his native land are met by a lot of rejection.

programme.title: Modern Family: Sleeper
programme.desc: Phil fails at his task to stay home and wait for the repairman, forcing him to tell an elaborate lie to hide the truth from Claire, but the stress is more than he can physically handle. Meanwhile, Gloria is responsible for organizing the family portrait.

programme.title: Modern Family: Message Received
programme.desc: Jay, Gloria and Manny challenge each other to step outside their comfort zone and try something new. Mitch and Cam's wedding is getting too big and costly, so they resort to selling a couple of their prized possessions.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam’s big day is finally here and nothing can ruin it, until nothing turns into a whole lot of somethings and puts wedding planner extraordinaire Pepper Saltzman to the test. Jay and Gloria host the Tuckers. Phil squeezes in an eye procedure.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding day chaos continues as the entire party shifts from one contingency plan to another. Guests start to get testy, Mitchell and Cameron are feeling discouraged and poor Claire shows physical wear and tear.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Long Honeymoon
programme.desc: This summer has been exceptionally blissful in the Dunphy house. Alex is away on a humanitarian trip and the rest of the family is getting along swimmingly, but when Alex comes home, there is an immediate shift in mood.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do Not Push
programme.desc: It's Jay and Gloria's anniversary and they can't seem to get on the same page on what kind of gift to give; sentimental or expensive. And, the Dunphys head to Caltech for Alex's college tour.

programme.title: Modern Family: Won't You Be Our Neighbor
programme.desc: Phil is selling the house next door and he and Claire are excited by the prospect of having wonderful new neighbours, but that quickly turns into panic when a loud and obnoxious couple come to look at the house.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween 3: AwesomeLand
programme.desc: Even though Halloween is Claire's holiday, she allows Phil to take over this year so instead of her usual fright-fest theme, he decides to turn the house into AwesomeLand.

programme.title: Modern Family: Three Turkeys
programme.desc: Phil is cooking Thanksgiving dinner this year with Luke as his sous chef, but Claire has no confidence in them and prepares a secret turkey of her own as backup.

programme.desc: After being temporarily transported to a futuristic place, a bright and curious teenager seeks out a jaded, former boy-genius inventor. What follows is a dangerous journey to uncover the secrets of a mysterious place existing somewhere in time and space.

programme.title: Movie: The Lorax
programme.desc: In order to impress the girl he has a crush on, a 12-year-old boy must discover the story of Lorax.

programme.title: Movie: Tarzan
programme.desc: A human baby is raised by gorillas. When scientists come to explore the area he is fascinated by them. After learning a great deal more about the people he comes from, Tarzan is faced with a choice of remaining with the gorillas or going with his people.

programme.title: Bones: The Nazi Honeymoon
programme.desc: While honeymooning in Buenos Aires, Brennan and Booth can't relax on vacation. So, instead, they decide to help Raphael Valenza, a local detective and huge fan of Brennan's books, solve the murder of a Nazi war criminal whose remains are in a mass grave.

programme.title: Bones: The Dude in the Dam
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team investigates the murder of a failed model whose body is found intertwined in a beaver dam. The team soon discovers that his fruitless modelling career left him with only his sperm donations as a source of income.

programme.title: Bones: The Fury in the Jury
programme.desc: Brennan is a juror on the case of professional soccer player Peter Kidman, who is accused of murdering his wife. When both his best friend and a key witness turn up dead, the team must prove the soccer star is, in fact, guilty of murder.

programme.title: Bones: The Mystery in the Meat
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team investigates the murder of a food scientist whose remains were tossed in a meat grinder and mixed into cans of stew served in a school cafeteria. The team investigates the scientist's jealous competitors.

programme.title: Movie: The Accountant
programme.desc: Christian Wolff is a math savant that becomes a freelance accountant for crime organizations. To appear legitimate, he takes on a legal client, a robotics company. He helps a young accountant clerk investigate a discrepancy, which places them in danger.

programme.title: Movie: Gone in 60 Seconds
programme.desc: A retired car thief re-enters the business to steal 50 cars with his crew in one night.

programme.title: Arrow: My Name Is Oliver Queen
programme.desc: Everyone's lives are in danger as Ra's al Ghul puts forth his final plan. Oliver/Al Sah-him must decide if he's strong enough to take on this new role, and what it will mean for everyone on Team Arrow and his soul.

programme.title: Arrow: Green Arrow
programme.desc: Oliver and Felicity's blissful getaway is cut short when Thea and Laurel pay them a visit and tell Oliver they need his help back in Star City. The city has been attacked by 'Ghosts,' assassins led by a dangerous man.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Means to An End
programme.desc: The NCIS team discovers a surveillance van filled with photos documenting Special Agent Pride's every move after his daughter is attacked on campus and placed in protective custody.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Second Line
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Navy lieutenant during a French Quarter second line funeral procession, a New Orleans tradition that celebrates the recently deceased with a musical parade.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: After a navy lieutenant dies during a clandestine visit to a general's hotel room, Special Agent Pride and the team are asked to break standard protocol for the murder investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: After a Navy recruiter is the target of a lethal hit and run, the team investigates whether the murder was tied to her career or her role as a foster mother to two brothers. Also, Lasalle grows increasingly concerned for his brother's welfare.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: More Now
programme.desc: Pride is adamant the elusive 'Baitfish' has returned and, in an attempt to locate his nemesis, he has the team investigate crime scenes and chase leads from New Orleans to Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The List
programme.desc: After a sailor is murdered in the champagne room of a strip club, the team links the murder weapon to two additional unsolved cases. Also, Brody's ex-fiancé pays her a surprise visit.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Insider
programme.desc: While conducting an autopsy on a petty officer who is believed to have died from natural causes, an armed man enters the morgue and holds Wade, Sebastian and Danny hostage.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Rock-a-Bye-Baby
programme.desc: When a navy commander's car is stolen with his baby inside, the team must determine if this was a random carjacking or a targeted abduction.

programme.title: Movie: Wrath of the Titans
programme.desc: When the ancient Titans are unleashed upon the world, Perseus braves the underworld to stop them and rescue his father, Zeus.

programme.title: Movie: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: A young Hobbit goes on a journey with a group of dwarves to the Lonely Mountain. They head out in hopes to regain the mountain as theirs again after a dragon named Smaug stole it from them.

programme.title: Movie: Total Recall
programme.desc: After visiting a company that supplies implanted memories, a factory worker begins to think he is a spy.

programme.title: Movie: The Book of Eli
programme.desc: A drifter in a post-apocalyptic society travels across America, protecting the last copy of the King James Bible in order to deliver it to the west coast so it can help save humanity. However, an evil gang lord seeks to take the book for himself.

programme.title: Movie: Taken
programme.desc: Agent Bryan Mills left the service to be closer to his daughter Kim. When she goes on a tour of France, she is kidnapped by human traffickers and Bryan does everything in his power to get her back.

programme.title: Movie: A Walk Among the Tombstones
programme.desc: An unlicensed private detective reluctantly takes the case of a drug trafficker whose wife was kidnapped and brutally murdered. Learning that the men responsible have committed similar heinous acts before, he races to catch them before they strike again.

programme.title: Movie: El Camino: A Breaking Bad Movie
programme.desc: Picking up from where the series left off, Jesse Pinkman finds himself on the run from captors, from the law, and the ghosts of his past.

programme.title: Movie: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: When the leader of a band of outlaws is captured, an impoverished rancher with a debt to pay agrees to escort the outlaw to a train bound for Yuma.

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Slippery Silks
programme.desc: The best shorts from these American comedy icons.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: For the Sake of the Child
programme.desc: Jake refuses to stay with Charlie and Alan after they embarrass him in public.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Give Me Your Thumb
programme.desc: Alan recommends to Chelsea that she get a breast reduction and Charlie kicks him out because of it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Golden Playbook
programme.desc: As Dave prepares for a new season of hunting gold, he gathers his team to go over the strategy in his mining playbook and looks back at lessons learned. Not only does he reveal their new prospecting location, but also makes his crew a life-changing offer.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker Doubles Down
programme.desc: Parker makes a big move to double his output to bring in more gold. The Beets face a catastrophe when their remaining operation grinds to a halt. Fred fires his dredge back up and lands his biggest gold haul yet. Dustin faces an uncertain future.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rebellion at Duncan Creek
programme.desc: A machine failure leads to an explosive uprising on Rick's claim. Parker's crew races to build a mountain of pay dirt. Fred taps out Thunder Falls with his biggest gold haul. Dustin hits the nugget jackpot. The Dirt returns with the Milwaukee boys.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Frozen Treasure
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Monica races to save the season with newly thawed paydirt. Rick tries to fix his wash plant so he can end his season strong. Parker builds a mega pond to keep his operation running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bring in the Big Guns
programme.desc: Rick confronts his landowners. Tony makes a massive purchase. Parker searches for new ground. Dave Turin finds a new lost mine with big gold in Montana. The Dirt uncovers Beets family secrets and reveals the truth to Dave's rough start.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Machine Mayhem
programme.desc: It's last chance for The Rookies' partnership. Col's crew is on a crash course as his reoccurring illness slows them down, while the Cooke Brothers fight busted hoses and breakdowns in the quest to strike it rich.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Rainy Lake Team Challenge: International Falls, MN

programme.desc: Richard Picciotto, the highest ranking FDNY firefighter to survive the collapse of the twin towers, is honoured by Governor Mike Huckabee.

programme.title: Street Outlaws

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Bayou Bruisers

programme.title: The Next Bite: Extending the Shallow Water Bite with Artificials for Summer Walleye

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Fear at First Bite

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Fireworks Technician
programme.desc: Mike travels to Pennsylvania to learn what it takes to be a fireworks technician. He then heads to the Arkansas State University to check out a cow with a hole in it's stomach.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger
programme.desc: Mike teams up with a master-cooper, also known as a barrel maker, and attempts to master the art of toasting the inside of barrels over an open flame. It is the toasting that gives the wine a special flavor while it ferments.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Soo Locks Technician
programme.desc: Mike heads to Sault Saint Marie, Michigan, to work with the Soo Locks maintenance crew.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Lightning Rod Installer

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Horse Tester

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rum Distiller

programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.desc: Strangers with poisoned candy don't exist, the panic over Orson Welles' War of the Worlds broadcast didn't happen and mediums are total frauds.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Playin' Chicken
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's playing a tasty game of chicken all over the country. In Alameda, Calif., a joint is cookin' it Nashville hot-style and putting a gourmet twist on a burger. In Lansing, Mich., the bird is served French-style at a pizza joint.

programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip. In Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot puttin' out pupusas and a cabeza creation. A funky food truck in Denver dishing out prime-time Puerto Rican specialties. And in Burlington, Vt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Poke, Pork and Chicken Parm
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's checking in on some of his favourite joints serving up a bite for any time of day. In Chicago, things have changed a lot for Guy's poke buddies. In Denver, a triple threat is adding some new biscuit sandwiches and late-night Italian options.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Everyday Eats

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Hug on a Plate
