programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Easy High Low
programme.desc: Ina Garten loves mixing fancy and casual fare, and she's sharing her secrets to this winning mashup of high and low. She takes everyday potato and celery root puree over the top with truffle butter and serves it with stunning seared scallops.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Giada's Dinner Cruise
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts an intimate dinner party on a boat in the marina. The sunset dinner cruise is complete with twinkling lights and a romantic and elegant menu.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Gold Medal Comfort

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Comfort Food, Quick
programme.desc: Rachael skips the fuss of making a traditional chicken pot pie by whipping up her easy, stove-top version in half the time. She tops it with golden pieces of puff pastry for a fast and pretty finish to this bowl of comfort.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Ranch Comfort
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's focusing on ranch comfort classics like old-fashioned Sweet and Sour Meatballs, heartwarming Quesadillas with Shrimp and Peppers and incredible Tex Mex Butternut Squash Soup. She also makes a Fried Red Tomato Sandwich.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Comfort Classics

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Comfort Food

programme.title: Tanked!: Chicago Bull Boom Box
programme.desc: Chicago Bull's star Jimmy Butler calls Wayde and Brett to build him an old school Boombox aquarium that lights up AND plays music. But a tricky entryway throws a wrench in their plans. Oakland Raiders' Donald Penn is in serious need of a custom insert.

programme.title: Tanked!: Dwight Howard's Slamming Snake Tank: Supersized
programme.desc: Dwight Howard is back again for his second, third, fourth tank and more. This basketball legend has moved since the guys last saw him and he needs the guys at ATM to design and build a habitat for all 14 of his snakes.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Miami Heat is On!
programme.desc: Seven-foot-tall NBA star Hassan Whiteside knows a thing or two about what it means to be big. He tasks Wayde and Brett with building him a tank so big it won't fit through the front door and has to be delivered to his Miami pad on a barge.

programme.title: Tanked!: NBA Wizardry
programme.desc: NBA All-Star John Wall asks ATM to build an aquarium shaped like a giant pair of dice. In Georgia they build a huge lighthouse aquarium for a local seafood restaurant that includes engraved dolphins.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: A Tank Fit for a Tank
programme.desc: The fight is on when ATM is tasked to build tanks for WWE Superstar Titus O'Neil and MMA Champ Urijah Faber. Titus wants a tank filled with University of Florida pride, while the California Kid wants an ocean-themed tank filled with puffer fish.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wyclef's Tank is Ready or Not?
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde get called to New Jersey for a tank emergency for world famous music producer, Wyclef Jean. This founder of the legendary group the Fugees has not one but two tanks that could really use ATM's help!

programme.title: Tanked!: Rock N' Roll Eruption!
programme.desc: A client requests an eight piece drum set tank that is fully playable, and the owners of the Lahaina Grill want to bring a little piece of Hawaii to their new bar.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: A Tank Fit for a Tank
programme.desc: The fight is on when ATM is tasked to build tanks for WWE Superstar Titus O'Neil and MMA Champ Urijah Faber. Titus wants a tank filled with University of Florida pride, while the California Kid wants an ocean-themed tank filled with puffer fish.

programme.desc: Brett and Wayde get called to New Jersey for a tank emergency for world famous music producer, Wyclef Jean. This founder of the legendary group the Fugees has not one but two tanks that could really use ATM's help!

programme.title: Tanked!: Rock N' Roll Eruption!
programme.desc: A client requests an eight piece drum set tank that is fully playable, and the owners of the Lahaina Grill want to bring a little piece of Hawaii to their new bar.

programme.title: Tanked!: Urijah Faber's Ultimate Fish Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett create not one but two knock out aquariums. MMA fighter Urijah Faber just opened his new gym and wants a little bit of the ocean inside, specifically a puffer. A couple hosts a party for The Marine Aquarium Convention.

programme.title: Tanked!: 100 Episodes STRONG!
programme.desc: ATM is excited to design a tank for WWE Superstar and tag team champion Titus O'Neil! The guys will need work as a tag team of their town in order to deliver on their promise to build a University of Florida themed Gator tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tanked in Sonoma
programme.desc: ATM has been so busy they could use a glass of wine! Good thing their next tank is on a vineyard. CEO of Jordan Winery wants a beautiful reef tank to live on his winery.

programme.title: Tanked!: Imaginarium Aquarium
programme.desc: The Imaginarium Science Center has asked ATM to design a giant ship-shaped tank with a replica of the USCGC Mohawk inside. Creating the unique shape of this tank proves an ocean sized headache.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Amazing Piano Tank
programme.desc: Pianoworks in Rochester, NY wants Wayde and Brett to build them a piano of their own. This one is made out of acrylic and filled with fish of course.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Shadow of the Jaguar
programme.desc: Coyote demonstrates how capturing elusive big cats on film is a near-impossible task, but with technological advancements such as trail cameras, nature enthusiasts can see predators like jaguars up close in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Realm of the Caiman
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to Brazil to encounter the Yacare Caiman. As he swims alongside them in piranha-infested waterways, he studies their perfect-predator personality as jaguars and capybara lurk from the shoreline.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: Tanked!: Anthony Davis' High Brow Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are designing an aquarium for NBA superstar Anthony Davis. ATM has their work cut out for them in order to please the power forward who wants to transform an entire room into an aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: Going for the Gold(fish)
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett get into the patriotic spirit when Olympic basketball phenom Paul George gives them a call. He wants two identical fish tanks next to his indoor pond, and he wants it done by the time he gets home from the Olympics in Rio.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Bulldog Bellyache
programme.desc: Yuki the bulldog ate something she shouldn't have and it's up to Dr. Blue to find it. Dr. Lavigne and his wife learn how to do alternative home care on Suki, a rescue cat his family adopted after he performed amputation surgery on both of her front legs.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Falcon Festival
programme.desc: The docs head to the Renaissance Faire to tend to the birds of prey in need of the West Nile vaccine. Piper the peppy dachshund is not herself and Dr. Lavigne must perform surgery. Meanwhile, Dr. Ross treats Tesla the tortoise for a fractured beak.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Hermaphrodite Hound
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne does a not so routine surgery on a hermaphrodite dog that's both male and female. A bearded dragon is battling a skin disease that Dr. Ross must treat before it causes serious problems. Dr. Blue manages work and a big family move.

programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover
programme.desc: Jenny and Dave are challenged to completely overhaul a historic Dutch Colonial home for a couple of farm owners and their two small children, while keeping the home's history and character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Entertaining Oasis
programme.desc: A married couple owns a wine bar and loves to entertain, but their home's not quite ready for guests due to its compartmentalized layout, unstable balconies and an enormous, rotting tree.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs transform the a family's historic, 1893 house. From turning an attic space into two bedrooms to completely renovating the kitchen and living area, they pull out all the stops to give the family of five their first home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Drab Victorian Gets a Fab Facelift
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs help a woman turn her historic 1905 home into a beautiful Victorian retreat. But they have their work cut out for them with its shoddy, unfinished contracting work throughout the living room, kitchen, master bedroom and back porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage
programme.desc: A couple who loves New Orleans-style architecture asks Dave and Jenny transform their classic Craftsman into a Creole cottage. The duo work to remodel each room with unique touches like antique doors, gas lanterns and an airy front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: Inspired By the Sea
programme.desc: A woman who has been renting for years is ready to buy a home, and her wish list includes a master bathroom with a big bathtub. Ben and Erin capitalize on the charm of the house and design a Nantucket-inspired kitchen and a stunning master suite.

programme.title: Home Town: Colourful Custom Cottage
programme.desc: Ben and Erin create a stunning kitchen and garden for a restaurant owner.

programme.title: Home Town: Restoring a Craftsman
programme.desc: A couple from Alabama is excited to settle down in a small town for the next phase of their lives. Ben and Erin help them choose a forever home and give it a historic renovation complete with a gorgeous master suite, custom kitchen and screened-in porch.

programme.title: Movie: Is My Daughter Really Dead?
programme.desc: A woman's husband dies in a mysterious car accident, so she decides to make a fresh start. Her daughter makes friends with some of the kids in the neighbourhood and goes on a camping trip with them, only to also end up missing.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: Trail of Terrors
programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave take on a case in McMinnville, Tennessee, where a woman believes paranormal phenomena in her home is affecting her health. Their investigation reveals the area's connection to the Trail of Tears could be to blame for the activity.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: The Apparition of Amelia
programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave investigate claims of horrific apparitions lurking inside a rural home in Brooktondale, New York. Their research reveals a series of tragic farming accidents could be to blame for the disturbing paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: A Legendary Haunting
programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave team up with a paranormal paramedic for a case in Halifax, Virginia, that has more activity than he's ever experienced. The investigation gets turned upside down after a sketch is drawn of a terrifying female apparition.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: The Boys Are Back
programme.desc: An amateur paranormal investigator calls on Dave, Jason and Steve to help her with a case she can't crack in White Pine, Tennessee. The team reaches out the locals to uncover the dark past haunting a frightened family's farmhouse.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: A Nightmare in the Nursery
programme.desc: The team heads to Highland, Michigan, to help a terrified family find answers after their toddler witnesses a ghostly figure walk across a room. Jason taps into his network of experts, who uncover a possible connection to a Native American burial ground.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits: Etched in Evil
programme.desc: Amy Bruni and Adam Berry investigate strange, mysterious symbols etched on the walls of an Indiana asylum. Psychic medium Chip Coffey joins the case to help them find out if the symbols are responsible for an uptick in paranormal activity on the property.

programme.title: Haunting in the Heartland: The Watchman
programme.desc: Steve Shippy is called to the village of Merrill, Michigan, to investigate an evil entity tormenting a young girl. With the help of a local historian, Steve discovers the town's long-forgotten traumatic past and its connection to the girl's home.

programme.title: Portals to Hell: The Alaskan Hotel

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: The Iceman is the world's oldest and most perfectly preserved mummy, and brand-new cutting-edge forensic technology is revealing his darkest secrets; these discoveries could change everything we know about the humans who lived 5,000 years ago.

programme.title: Unearthed: Titanic: The Last Secrets
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into the sinking of the Titanic reveals new discoveries that might finally explain the mysteries of her last moments, and experts get closer to a shocking secret: if there was a way to save almost everyone on board.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the Real Atlantis
programme.desc: A mysterious ruined city in Greece is the home of the mythical Labyrinth and the Minotaur, and its catastrophic downfall might have inspired the legend of Atlantis. New discoveries at this site reveal a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: The Informant
programme.desc: An inmate risks his life and turns informant to help Sergeant Hampton and Special Agent John Fisher eliminate the inmates' outside drug source.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Maston/ Young
programme.desc: A man who had it all loses everything after his wife leaves him, taking their only child with her. Despondent over the loss, he robs a gas station and then leads police on a high-speed chase through the city streets of Indianapolis.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Justin/ Frank
programme.desc: A struggling father resorts to illegal means to make a living, leading him into a situation involving stolen property; a doting grandfather ends up on the wrong side of the law and flees after being pulled over

programme.title: Why I Ran: Scott/ Trey
programme.desc: A man starts new life only to find himself caught up in a high-speed pursuit due to drugs.

programme.title: Twisted Fate: No Way Out
programme.desc: A woman's life takes an unforeseen turn for the better after crossing paths with a madman. After being wrongly convicted of a brutal murder and put on death row, an unforeseen twist of fate changes a man's life and the criminal justice system forever.

programme.title: Twisted Fate: Unbreakable
programme.desc: Melissa Stockwell always dreamed of defending her country, but when she suffered a debilitating injury in Iraq, she had to learn to serve in a new way.

programme.title: Twisted Fate: Nothing's Perfect
programme.desc: After nearly two years at sea, the Silverwood family was on the brink of collapse. When the unimaginable happened in the middle of the South Pacific, the family found a strength it never knew it had.

programme.title: Twisted Fate: Point of No Return
programme.desc: A woman's two children were ripped from her grasp and taken to the Middle East by her ex-husband. A man's drug fueled life of crime crashed around him until a call for help transformed him from felon to millionaire.

programme.title: Twisted Fate: Shattered Truth
programme.desc: Native Iraqi, Rafraf Barrack was taught to hate America until a violent act shed a peaceful light on the enemy she thought she knew. Attorney Shari Karney was a shark in the courtroom but no one ever thought she'd assault a witness.

programme.title: Twisted Fate: At Close Range
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Crystal Miller was going down a dark path when two of her classmates gunned-down everyone around her. In the aftermath, she had to reassess who she was and who she wanted to be.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola
programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: The Big House: Kentucky State Penitentiary
programme.desc: Cameras follow an officer on his shift and step inside the Kentucky State Pen high security block.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Toy Gun
programme.desc: Rebecca Webster was the only female rookie in her Academy class. She knows that as a woman in a man's world, she's going to have to work twice as hard to prove herself. However, Rebecca's rush to do everything on her own just might backfire on her.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: One More Time
programme.desc: Mark Monson gets assessed by his sergeant for the second time. If he passes this time, he may begin to ride solo and get his own car. If he fails again, his dream of becoming a cop will be in jeopardy

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Step Up or Step Off
programme.desc: FTO Michael is concerned about a rookie's shyness who fails a simple, important test.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: The Lost Rookie
programme.desc: Charles was an officer in the military for several years, but is starting at the bottom again as a rookie cop in Jefferson Parish. When he disobeys protocol, Greg is furious and worried for his safety.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: A man takes cyber-stalking to a whole new level by sending hundreds of threatening messages and posting over 40 videos on social media that document his twisted fixation for a former high school classmate.

programme.title: American Monster: Two Families
programme.desc: Unraveling the mystery behind the confusing evidence at the scene of April Holton's tragic murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Into the Swamp
programme.desc: At a family-run construction company, brothers and cousins work hard together - and play even harder. But when one of them vanishes, no one has answers. The mystery of his disappearance - and the salacious betrayal behind it - isn't solved for 20 years.

programme.title: American Monster: An Open Relationship
programme.desc: Brent Cotta's popular wife, Cassie, has mysteriously disappeared on New Year's Eve in Fort Smith, Arkansas. When family and friends conduct a search, the discovery of a shallow grave soon leads to the horrific truth emerging.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lethal Romance
programme.desc: An ambitious Harlem couple dreams of a better life for themselves. Unfortunately they're stuck in a bitter cycle of poverty poor health and mistrust leading one of them to decide to put their dreams to rest, forever.

programme.title: Young, Hot, & Deadly: Jodi Arias Part 1
programme.desc: The beloved Travis Alexander is found brutally murdered. As the police begin to investigate, incriminating evidence surfaces, and the focus of the investigation is placed on his ex-girlfriend, Jodi Arias.

programme.title: Young, Hot, & Deadly: Jodi Arias Part 2
programme.desc: Jodi Arias is arrested for the murder of her ex-boyfriend and quickly becomes a media sensation as her trial unfolds.

programme.title: Young, Hot, & Deadly: Jodi Arias Part 3
programme.desc: As Jodi takes the stand, she reveals scandalous details of the couple's relationship. Jurors are left shocked and confused as they try to piece together what actually happened between Jodi and Travis.

programme.title: Young, Hot, & Deadly: Jodi Arias Part 1

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lethal Romance
programme.desc: An ambitious Harlem couple dreams of a better life for themselves. Unfortunately they're stuck in a bitter cycle of poverty poor health and mistrust leading one of them to decide to put their dreams to rest, forever.

programme.title: Dark Minds: Death on a Beach
programme.desc: Torrey Pines Beach, CA is an idyllic place, but it's also been the scene of horror. Two teenagers were murdered here 30 years ago and there is still no justice. The Dark Minds team retraces the final hours of the victim's lives and uncovers new clues.

programme.title: Dark Minds: The Phantom of Civil Theater
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Lewiston, Idaho, an eerie local theatre has dark past. Three people went missing here, two turned up dead. Is it a local killer, connected to a string of other murders? The team from Dark Minds dive into a deep mystery.

programme.title: Deadly Legacy: Bill Bundy
programme.desc: Detective Jason Moran re-opens the case of serial killer John Wayne Gacy. Unbelievably, eight of his 33 victims were unidentified. The grieving family of Bill Bundy, missing for 40 years, wonder if he might have been a victim.

programme.title: Deadly Legacy: Edward Beaudion
programme.desc: The grieving family of Chicago youth Edward Beaudion, missing for 40 years, wonder if he had been a victim of John Wayne Gacy.

programme.title: Deadly Legacy: Jimmy Haakenson
programme.desc: The grieving family of St. Paul boy Jimmy Haakenson, missing for 40 years, wonder if he had been a victim of Gacy.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: A father of three is murdered in his own home, stabbed 32 times with an X carved into his neck.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: Daniel Ott is just one day from moving with his girlfriend when an intruder shoots him dead with a shotgun. A stunning coincidence will lead the investigation into the heart of one of the most dangerous criminal rings in the country...

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Body in the Glades
programme.desc: 42-year-old Miami mother Raquel Calderin vanishes without a trace on her way home from work in 2012. The investigation will lead detectives deep into a disturbing family picture, and the truth will haunt them for years to come.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Secrets of the Santa Cruz Mountains
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Linda Jozavich vanishes from work one night in 1979, it just doesn't make sense to her Santa Cruz community. Years later, the murder of another local teen, Lois Sigala, sends investigators a step closer to solving Linda's case.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Curse of Dismal Creek
programme.desc: Sean Farmer travels to a remote campsite in Virginia for a fishing trip with his friend Scott Johnston. When a mysterious stranger appears, the area's dark past returns to haunt the campers.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: Dead Silent: When a Stranger Knocks
programme.desc: After fleeing her troubled marriage, Deborah Brown and her kids seek refuge at her brother's house in rustic Lebanon, Maine. But when a stranger shows up in the dead of night seeking help, neither Deborah nor her family are prepared for what happens next.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: American Titans: Daly vs. Clark
programme.desc: The lawless territory of 1880's Montana remains up for grabs. Two relentless American Titans, William Clark and Marcus Daly, find themselves in a war to control power over the state and to mine millions in copper ore hidden in the 'richest hill on earth.'

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Lot of Pot
programme.desc: Moving small amounts of pot from Mexico lead to a bustling operation for Steve Lamb. By age 20, Lamb was part of a group of traffickers who made millions. Eluding the police, Lamb moved bails of marijuana across the sea until caught in a sting operation.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Dumped
programme.desc: The main suspect in the murder of a pregnant ex-girlfriend, and wanted for the shooting of a current one, Michael Alfonso is a jealous boyfriend who time and again turns to violence. It is Alfonso's criminal lifestyle that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Remarried
programme.desc: After an argument one morning, Michael McGuffey shot his wife point blank in the head. With support from his mother, Michael flees Mexico where he remarries and has a child. The FBI is able to trace Michael by his bank records and bring him into custody.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Sing Karaoke
programme.desc: Joe Crouch wakes up one morning, and after 40 years of marriage, shoots his wife while she sleeps. He flees to Florida and embraces his fugitive life. He funds his hobbies by robbing banks. It is his love of karaoke that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got That Tough Girl Look
programme.desc: Juanita Liebman and two friends plan to rob a man at Biketoberfest in FL, but it goes wrong and the three kick him into a coma. Juanita tries to lay low, but her epilepsy requires medical attention. The cops stake out the pharmacy to apprehend her.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Remarried

programme.title: American Titans: Daly vs. Clark

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Presidential Special
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Truth Will Set You Free

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.desc: A married couple takes on a flip in their hometown of Hillsdale, Michigan. Their strict budget is put in jeopardy when they discover major damage to the roof that threatens the entire structure of the house.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: DIY or Die
programme.desc: Megan and Sarah run a DIY blog and workshop, but they've decided to take their projects to the next level: flipping a house. These girls may have an eye for design, but they have a lot to learn about construction.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flipping Over Cabinets
programme.desc: A daughter enlists her mom as her partner for a flip in East Tennessee. They have big hopes for the renovation but their methods clash when the daughter wants to move through projects quickly instead of following her mother's tested methods.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flip Out of Reach
programme.desc: A husband and wife set out to flip a spacious home all by themselves in Baltimore. As a real estate agent, she knows what the people want, but he worries her-high end tastes and minimal experience will sabotage their profits.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: A Flip for All Seasons
programme.desc: First-timers enlist their friend to flip a house in Long Island, NY. After the group is forced to tear down the entire frame of the house, the race if on to rebuild it from the foundation and finish as fast as possible.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Flue Season
programme.desc: A husband-wife duo flip an oddly shaped lake house in Leitchfield, Kentucky, with a unique history. Shae has a vision for the house while he has the construction knowledge, but things start to go awry when he gets involved in the design.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Jokin' Around in Georgia
programme.desc: Homeowners use their own skills to turn a disaster house into a high-dollar flip.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Family Legacy
programme.desc: The three build teams kick off their builds in unique, remote Alaskan settings. A family legacy cabin in the Wrangell Mountains, a guest cabin in Eagle Song, and an island getaway on Shelter Island.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bump Outs and Burls
programme.desc: Alaskan builder Adam Tschappat's team is cut in half due to volunteer firefighter duties delaying his Family Legacy cabin build in the Wrangell Mountains. Mike Williams is facing a 100 degree change in temperature that forces him to focus on the farm.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Builder Mike Williams is in a mad scramble to save his peonies from dying. Dave and Hans's 50 thousand pounds of material make it to shore unharmed. Builder Adam Tschappat does some precision work from 2 logs to 12 logs high for his Family Legacy cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Plywood Don't Lie
programme.desc: Mike and his team gain some ground and try to keep it while laying plywood. Dave and Hans try and get reacquainted with their build. Adam comes face to face with his biggest fear for his cabin's success.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Lofty Goals
programme.desc: Mike Williams gets all 45 of his logs peeled and starts to stack and insulate his cabin. Dave and Hans deal with dangerous heavy fog on their boat journey to Shelter Island. Adam saves the day with an extra bag of cement.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Saluting The USO
programme.desc: Four cupcake champions compete to serve at a black tie gala celebrating the USO.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: America's Cup-Cake
programme.desc: The cupcake makers fight to have their cupcakes featured at a party for the America's Cup.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cody Simpson
programme.desc: Four mother-daughter teams compete to go backstage with pop star Cody Simpson.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: International Intrigue
programme.desc: The six young bakers must fake it to make it as Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge them to create imposters that look like international dishes, such as sushi or shish kebab, but taste like dessert.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Hole-y Hedgehogs
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the five young bakers to each make a poke cake with fillings such as pureed fruit or pudding.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Beauty Is in the Pie of the Beholder
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman present the four young bakers with late-summer fruit and challenge them to bake a beautiful, delicious pie. Only the cream of the crop will make it to the finale.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Out of This World
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman are lost in space and challenge the three remaining bakers to create cakes that look like a spaceship, aliens or another planet.

programme.title: Winner Cake All: It's a Bubsy Birthday
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis challenges four baking teams to make a cake decoration that shows the ultimate family celebration. After one team is eliminated, the remaining three teams meet their VIP clients, the Bubsy family from TLC's 'OutDaughtered.'

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Farm Fresh
programme.desc: Alfonso showcases foods with farm-fresh ingredients. Go hog wild over Benton's Bacon, see the Georgian pecans going into Carolina Foods' Duchess Pecan Pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Southern Treats
programme.desc: In the land of Dixie, see how a few of the favorite sweet Southern treats are made. Watch GooGoo Clusters take a bath in chocolate; Red Bird Peppermint Puffs earn their stripes, and find out the sweet secret behind Carolina Foods' Honeybun.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Quick Fix
programme.desc: Alfonso comes to the rescue with quick fixes. P.F. Chang's Home Menu Beef and Broccoli frozen entree makes weeknight meals easy and Chocolate Chip Quaker Chewy Bars are a great snack for kids and adults both.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Let It Roll
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro finds there just about anything can be rolled in La Chiquita's Tomato and Basil Tortilla. He also discovers how Stuckey's Pecan Log Roll evolved from a sweet treat sold from the trunk of a car, into a roadside classic.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Simple Goodness
programme.desc: Alfonso covers all things easy from snacks that evoke childhood memories like iconic Hostess Twinkies and the colorful Jel Sert Otter Pops to easy dinner solutions like Bertolli's Chicken Parmigiana and Penne.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet and Sour
programme.desc: Pucker up and rev up your sweet tooth as host Alfonso Ribeiro explore snacks with the tongue-tingling twist of sweet and sour!

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Barbecue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cannot resist the sweet, succulent smoky goodness of barbecue as he canvasses the country on the lookout for the fifteen best barbecue dishes wherever he can find them.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Soul Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking joins chefs in their own kitchens as they honour the traditions of comforting and flavorful soul food dishes. From ribs, catfish and barbecue to oxtail, pork chops and cornbread.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light My Latin Fire
programme.desc: Roger Mooking fires up two delicioso Latin-inspired feasts. In St. Augustine, Fla., Roger meets Nick Carrera, a grill master and grill maker behind Urban Asado. They roast whole lambs and vegetables on Nick's asado crosses.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roadside 'Cue
programme.desc: While road-tripping through Texas, Roger Mooking pulls the car over for some seriously delicious barbecue. In San Antonio, he makes a pit stop at The Box Street Social food truck to hang chickens and racks of ribs over a live fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: A Tale of Two BBQs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits an old-school barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a popular restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pantry Raid II: Seeing Red

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Symptoms
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Knitwits/ Dimmsdale's Got Talent?
programme.desc: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it's really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Todd Scouts/Goyles, Goyles, Goyles
programme.desc: The TMNT need to learn how to listen and get in touch with nature in order to save Todd after he’s captured by a group of hunters.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtledega Nights: The Ballad of Rat Man/ The Ancient Art of Ninja Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Splinter enters the Turtle Tank in a demolition derby. And, Splinter teaches his sons the Art of Ninja Concealment.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: World's Best Mom
programme.desc: Jack tries his hand at parenting in Mother Simulator, Crank gets hired in Job Simulator, and Markiplier takes a road trip in Clustertruck.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: All Aboard the Snakeybus
programme.desc: Jacksepticeye cruises around Miami in the Snakeybus, Pokimane goes for her first victory in Brawl Stars, and Markiplier takes his son for a wild ride in Guts N Glory.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Mummyfest Destiny/ Bandages of Brothers
programme.desc: Pedro's amulet has the ability to stop time, ensuring he's always first up at the buffet. When Mavis attempts to use it, however, trouble ensues. Since Pedro and Hank aren't getting along, Mavis and Wendy suggest they look for new roommates.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Royal Rumble
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: City of Monsters
programme.desc: Karmi and Hiro team up to help treat someone with genetically engineered parasites.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Blessious This Messious
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Give Me All Your Cheese
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Night of the Living Virus
programme.desc: Leo accidentally releases a virus that transforms Eddy into a virtual demon.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Exoskeleton vs. Grandma
programme.desc: When Davenport's prized invention, a super strength and laser empowered exoskeleton suit, malfunctions, Leo takes it upon himself to fix it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Birthday Fail
programme.desc: Adam, Bree, and Chase, who have never had a birthday party of their own, get so caught up in throwing a surprise party for Leo that they forget to invite him to it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Can I Borrow the Helicopter?
programme.desc: After a few failed attempts at impressing Janelle, Leo borrows Davenport's high-speed helicopter to take her on a daring date. Meanwhile, Bree decides to move out of the lab and into her own room.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Back From the Future
programme.desc: Leo, from seven years in the future, arrives in present day to prevent Adam, Bree and Chase from going on a mission from which they won't return.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Air Leo
programme.desc: In order to try and impress Janelle, Leo signs up for a one-on-one basketball tournament against the current reigning champ.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Leo's Jam
programme.desc: When Leo needs help asking a girl to the school dance, Adam and Chase step in to help, but the plan backfires when she falls for the wrong brother. The boys decide to settle their differences on the dance floor and each show off their best moves.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Rats on a Train
programme.desc: The Lab Rats get their first mission to stop Davenport's hi-tech super fast train from speeding out of control. When they discover that Leo accidentally discarded the braking system they were supposed to install, they are forced to improvise.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Mission Invisible
programme.desc: When the kids are caught on Principal Perry’s camera using bionics, getting the evidence out of her hands becomes their most important mission yet.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Bonding! Aiger vs. Valt!
programme.desc: Aiger reflects on his journey and the two constants that have been with him since the start: his bond with Achilles and his rivalry with Valt.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Ace Dragon! On the Rise!
programme.desc: After training with Valt Aoi, Dante Koryu is ready to take on the world with his new Bey, Ace Dragon!

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Abracadabra! Wizard Fafnir!
Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs Fafnir!
programme.desc: In an attempt to humiliate the Victories, Fumiya challenges Dante to a battle that will be broadcast around the country.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Inspiration! Challenging Valt!
programme.desc: Blading superstar Valt Aoi visits Dante for a friendly battle before opening the Bey Carnival; once the tournament begins, the Victories will need to get the hang of the Hyper Stadium if they hope to win.

programme.title: Yo-Kai Watch: Hapyon Detective Agency: Case No. 4: Gloomy Yo-kai Mystery / Yo-Kai Nummskull
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: From Z to Shining Z
DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Northern Frights/ Don't Fear the Realtor
programme.desc: Uncle Gene's been invited to a performance of the Northern Frights! Maggie the ghostwriter is back and wants to sell Hotel Transylvania.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: I Only Have Eyes for Goo/ Talk Blobbish To Me
programme.desc: Thanks to a cursed prescription, Wendy's new glasses allow her to read minds.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Holy Babies/ Aunt Lydia's New Clothes
programme.desc: Mavis fibs that it is her birthday to get an ice scream bar. After 500 years, Aunt Lydia's invisibility poncho arrives.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Cries and Dolls/ Hypnosferatu
programme.desc: Mavis' dreams are haunted by a familiar foe. Mavis attempts to master the art of vampnosis.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Student
programme.desc: A teen becomes obsessed with her new high school soccer coach and proceeds to sabotage his life and relationship after he refuses her sexual advances.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Teacher
programme.desc: A successful teacher has a passionate one-night-stand with a younger man. She later determines he's a student at her school, and, he's determined to stop at nothing to have her for himself.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A troubled teen on house arrest falls for the boy next door, until she becomes convinced there is more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Pinsetter Mechanic
programme.desc: Mike travels to Fremont, CA, to help maintain a bowling centre. Then he responds to a letter from one of his fans who wants to see more footage of cameraman Doug.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Hunted
programme.desc: A mother of four and a country boy are dropped into the jaguar filled jungle of Belize. While they hunt for food, something is hunting them, and the mental part of the challenge gets to them both.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Burnt to a Crisp
programme.desc: Tormented by hostile crocodiles, territorial howler monkeys and no tree canopy to protect them from the sun in this post-hurricane Nicaraguan jungle, one survivalist suffers third-degree sunburn while the other's life is threatened by a mystery illness.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Feel the Burn
programme.desc: Dropped into Guyana's scorching savannah, two Naked and Afraid superfans battle the oppressive heat and relentless insect attacks. Scorching temperatures lead to severe dehydration and force a desperate fan to risk illness by drinking unsanitary fluids.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stomping Grounds
programme.desc: Elite survivalists Matt Wright and Gary Golding are tested by deadly spitting cobras and territorial elephants in an African killing zone. But Matt and Gary aren't alone each must protect a novice survivalist from the threats surrounding them.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Afraid of Sharks
programme.desc: Five 'Naked and Afraid' all-stars must survive 14 days in shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: Two pairs of strangers, dropped on opposite ends of the remote Panamanian rainforest, eventually meet and must work together to conquer the Everest of extreme survival challenges.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: Instant attraction gives way to unforgiving conditions on a Nicaraguan island teeming with bull sharks and big cats. As the struggle to survive hits a low point; a brutal flood threatens to wipe out the camp and all chances of survival.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Business
programme.desc: Each year, dozens of US craft distilleries fail, and Tim Smith knows why. In this episode, Tim and his team of experts help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery 'put the woods back in the whiskey,' in hopes of turning it from problem to profit.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: If Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: Josh explores other great walls around the world, from a cursed fortress along India's Aravalli Mountains to a series of towering metal forks that once defended Britain from the Nazis and were taken over by pirates of radio.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: On the Water With Jimmy
programme.desc: Jimmy and his friend Jimmy Sites go bass fishing.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Seasons on the Fly Lodge 2019
programme.desc: We go to the Seasons on the Fly Lodge on Alaska's Kvichak River.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Army - Rebekkah Camp and Jason Martin
programme.desc: Two veterans help each other cope through their military struggles and PTSD.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Backcountry Schoolhouse
programme.desc: It's a day of fun-fishing in the Everglades catching redfish, snook and tarpon.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Islamorada, FL Keys, Dolphin by the book!
programme.desc: George Poveromo teams up with Jake Roth from Post Card Inn.

programme.title: Silver Kings: Big Mike
programme.desc: Jared is joined by Fire Captain and Florida Keys Guide Mike Alfano.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Snookin' Around Jupiter
programme.desc: Rick is guided by Capt. Craig Korcyznski as he fishes Jupiter Inlet for snook.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fan Down
programme.desc: A freak injury puts super-fan survivalists Maci and Justin at risk as they attempt to survive the treacherous Nicaraguan jungle for 14 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Don't Let the Jungle Bugs Bite
programme.desc: Avoiding dangers of a rushing river, two survivalists brave a vast cave system in the Colombian rainforest. Trying to survive three weeks, the jungle tests them with threats like venomous fer-de-lance snakes, piranhas, and biting insects everywhere.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: All Falls Down
programme.desc: An elite endurance athlete and a sensitive stay-at-home dad team up in a rugged Belize jungle where jaguars, venomous snakes, falling trees, and powerful storms threaten their evolving partnership.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A special ops vet teams up with a single mom to fight torrential rains, flash floods and sickness in Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before the river leaves them stranded from the crew.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Swamp Don't Care
programme.desc: All-star survivalists Jake Nodar and Melissa Miller take on a punishing Florida swamp teeming with poisonous snakes and aggressive alligators. When one of the survivalists becomes disoriented local authorities are called in to conduct an all-out search.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Swarmed by bugs and a lack of food Gary and Karra's survival skills in the arid, desolate savannah region of Brazil are tested. After days of starvation, one of them eats unripe fruit and pays the consequence by becoming desperately ill.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Feral Fashion: Helter Swelter
programme.desc: Survivalists struggle to survive a sweltering Brazilian jungle. A competitor fashions 'shoes' out of a piece of rawhide and a bikini top out of palm leaves.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jim/ Susan
programme.desc: Jim and his wife will be homeless and the grandchildren that he has custody of will become wards of the state if he doesn't clean his home. Susan's daughter is threatening to call Protective Services if her mom doesn't clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders: Phyllis/ Janet
programme.desc: Phyllis' house is packed with a floor to ceiling collection of bags stuffed with dolls. Janet has to crawl over mountains of garbage to get to the one recliner where she eats and sleeps.

programme.title: Hoarders: Randy/ Vicki
programme.desc: Randy's boardwalk memorabilia collection fills a 20,000 square foot building and numerous tractor trailers. Vicki's hoarding is breaking up her family.

programme.title: Hoarders: Lisa/ Bertha
programme.desc: Lisa is an active chef, a member of various cooking groups, and a compulsive food hoarder. Bertha picks through trash on her paper route searching for treasures to take home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mike/ Bonnie
programme.desc: Mike's house is so toxic that a virus she contracted in the home caused her kidneys to fail, nearly killing her. Bonnie's home is hoarded and in need of repair.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ben and Robin and Kevin
programme.desc: Ailing couple, Ben and Robins's hoarding is so severe that EMT's can no longer access their home for emergencies. Kevin is hiding a hoard of sexual paraphernalia in his home from his family by living in a hotel.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Deputies in Florida track a suspect with the help of heli-cam and a K9 unit; officers find a young toddler barely alive in a car wreck; and a Texas man resists arrest.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A Las Vegas officer has a gun fight through a windshield, an escaped convict is caught stealing, and a kidnapped woman is rescued.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A father and son attempt to flee authorities; K9 Officer tracks a car thief in Florida; and Deputies work to save the life of a man overdosing.

programme.title: Movie: Escape Plan
programme.desc: An expert at escaping from prison is betrayed and locked in the most secret and secure facility ever built. He and another inmate must work together to get out this time.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Celebrating 200 Episodes: The First Hundred
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal reminisce about the first hundred episodes of Impractical Jokers. They discuss the very beginning of the show, everything that's changed over the years, and their time on the road.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Celebrating 200 Episodes: The Second Hundred
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal reminisce about the past hundred episodes of Impractical Jokers. They discuss pulling off long cons, their favorite punishments, and examine how much they've all aged since season one.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring

programme.desc: Leslie, Ben and Andy head to San Francisco for a National Parks conference. Tom opens his restaurant, and Ron has another run in with his ex-wife, Tammy 2. Leslie makes a huge decision about her future.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: An Entire Life's Savings
programme.desc: Robert Irvine travels to Murphys, California, to check up on a breakfast-and-lunch diner Hillbillies Restaurant. On his last visit, Robert found a tacky, messy restaurant, a defiant and lazy staff and owner Jamie at her wits' end.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Beloved Restaurant on the Rocks
programme.desc: Robert Irvine visits Ferguson, Mo., to help a beloved community restaurant on the brink of closing its doors. The owners of Drake's Place, Sonny and Bridget, are out of both money and options.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tri-Continent Cuisine
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out killer cuisine spanning three different continents. In Denver, a unique quick service spot dishes out a creative take on Indian curry. Then in northwest Denver, a Brazilian bistro cooks up the bomb croquettes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Biscuits to Brisket
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging in to stick-to-your-ribs comfort food. In Atlanta, the down-home joint cooking up righteous chicken and biscuits and house-cured lox.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East-West Flavorfest
programme.desc: Washington D.C. serves dumplings and ramen. Atlantic City has a pizza parlor with cheeseburger and chicken vodka pizza. Also, roast beef and cinnamon rolls in Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Between The Bread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's always down for a good sandwich, so he's stopping in to check out some of the Triple D Nation's latest creations. A food truck in Nashville put down roots and started churning out cheesy concoctions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast, West Coast

programme.desc: A local woman calls Tia to surrender puppies that she can't care for anymore, but Tia is shocked by what she finds. Months after their house was destroyed in a fire, M2 and Kanani prepare to move into their new home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Pitz Carlton
programme.desc: Lizzy and Elise struggle to rescue a dehydrated dog in the blazing heat. An anxious, abandoned dog is moved to a new warehouse for dogs with special needs. And, Tia and the twins help a friend of the rescue find the perfect match.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Last of the Mobsters
programme.desc: Tia and her kids race to rescue a stray dog near a dangerous, busy highway. An adoption requires some temperament testing in an 18-wheel truck when a trucker wants to adopt a dog to join him on the road. And, a return adopter seeks out a senior dog.

programme.desc: Tia Maria Torres works to save pit bulls from dangerous and abusive situations.

programme.desc: A Pennsylvania prison offers to take twenty dogs from Villalobos. An emaciated pit bull fights for its life. A potential adopter travels from Michigan to meet a dog that stole her heart, but then is shocked when she comes face to face.

programme.desc: Police rescue a turtle caught on fishing line and it's up to Dr. Ross to unhook him. Dr. Blue must wait for test results after performing dental surgery on a loveable dachshund, while Dr. Lavigne gives a stray cat first class treatment.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
