programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: In a land of beauty and peril, the dramatic lives and fortunes of its animals are inexorably bound together. Intimate and emotional, epic and engaging, 'Yellowstone' reveals the grandeur of this amazing place as its animals struggle to survive.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As the snow melts, the extent of Yellowstone is revealed. Grizzly bears teach their young how to hunt fish and when to move out through valleys and grasslands into summer forests and up into the peaks. But summer here is fickle.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands

programme.title: City Confidential: Milwaukee: The Legend of Bambi Bembenek
programme.desc: A curvaceous former Playboy Bunny was charged with the murder of her husband's ex-wife.

programme.title: City Confidential: Atlantic City
programme.desc: This East Coast gambling mecca is not without its mob problems.

programme.title: I Solved a Murder: Adam Bruckner
programme.desc: A woman is found murder and hanging in Philadelphia and a professional soccer player steps in to help solve the crime.

programme.title: I Solved a Murder: Sheila Wysocki
programme.desc: A woman is viciously murdered and police run out of leads until her best friend takes on the case herself.

programme.title: I Solved a Murder: Melinda Elkins
programme.desc: A woman tries to clear her husband after police say he committed a heinous murder.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Girl Gone
programme.desc: A high school freshman disappears. As hours turn to days, her family and town residents wonder if a killer is in the midst.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Mother and Child
programme.desc: An unbelievable tragedy ripples through a small community and sends John in pursuit of outlaw Jory Worthen. Callahan takes on the case of fugitive Derrell Demon Brown, an offender with a dark past who committed a violent, personal crime.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: When a costly mistake allows a criminal to escape justice, John steps in to help investigators in pursuit of felon Lester Eubanks. And Cal looks into the case of William Stanson, a supposed loving father who turned out to be a sexual predator.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Blood Money
programme.desc: John joins police on a strange and twisting missing persons case that turns fatal, sending investigators on the trail of Alejandro Castillo; Cal takes on the case of Leticia Smith, a woman on the run from a terrible crime with nothing to lose.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Mother and Child
programme.desc: An unbelievable tragedy ripples through a small community and sends John in pursuit of outlaw Jory Worthen. Callahan takes on the case of fugitive Derrell Demon Brown, an offender with a dark past who committed a violent, personal crime.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: When a costly mistake allows a criminal to escape justice, John steps in to help investigators in pursuit of felon Lester Eubanks. And Cal looks into the case of William Stanson, a supposed loving father who turned out to be a sexual predator.

programme.desc: John joins police on a strange and twisting missing persons case that turns fatal, sending investigators on the trail of Alejandro Castillo; Cal takes on the case of Leticia Smith, a woman on the run from a terrible crime with nothing to lose.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Behind Bars
programme.desc: An inmate in a West Virginia jail finds love in a hopeless place with a guard, but their love comes at a tragic cost.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Officer, Not a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Filipino woman falls for a married US Navy Officer who will do anything to keep his mistress and his money.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Twenty-eight-year-old army veteran and beloved father of three, Joey Fulgham, is shot dead in his bed in May 2003. With so many suspects Joey's wife, her jealous boyfriend, and even her protective teenage brother police have a lot of ground to cover.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: The Sheriff's Son
programme.desc: When an Arkansas outdoorsman disappears, authorities wade through a series of accusations and rumors in their hunt for the missing man. As they zero in on a suspect and the body count rises, detectives rush to capture the killer before it's too late.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: In October 2016, after helping a friend fix his computer, 18-year-old tech prodigy, Sam Poss, takes off on foot and never returns home. Did the beloved teen run away? Was there an accident? Police work around the clock to find the truth.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Horror on the Homestead
programme.desc: When three respected members of a tight-knit community of award-winning Christmas tree farmers are brutally gunned down, terrified locals fear that a cold-blooded killer has been living among them for years.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: When one of their own is tortured and killed, a tight circle of Chicago doctors wonder if the killer came from within.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Homicide on the Rails
programme.desc: A spring break adventure turns deadly when a college student infiltrates a community of train hoppers.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Lucky Luciano: Father of the Mob
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the U.S. government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mob Citizen: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: The story of mobster Joe Colombo, whose love of fame and money was matched by his determination to campaign against Italian-American harassment in the United States.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Big Lift
programme.desc: Mike and his team get the rafters and roofing underway but with no lack of challenges. Dave and Hans are on their own with setting the extremely heavy ridge beam until help arrives. Adam successfully transports all of his logs to his build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Lost in Logs
programme.desc: Dave and Hans have two 700-hundred pound ridgepoles to set. Running out of weatherproofing Mike is forced to forge ahead in dodgy weather. For builder Adam, a faster pace comes to a screeching halt when two crucial logs go missing.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bush Alaska Approved
programme.desc: The tides become the ultimate decider for Dave, Hans, and Steve, and send Steve to the workshop. For builder Adam and his family, the weather can't dampen their excitement as they finish their cabin. Mike is racing the first snowfall.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Mission Revival Mansion
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a mother and her grown-up children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion. He's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not open to the idea.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.desc: Alton Brown transforms broccoli from limp and bitter to crisp and delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco
programme.desc: Look no further than San Francisco, California for the best eating on the West Coast. Built on classics like Dungeness Crab Louie and sourdough bread, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the City by the Bay so delectable.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs Fafnir!

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: A Full Battle Bounty!

programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Running Backs
programme.desc: Legendary running backs come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Emmitt Smith, Eric Dickerson, Larry Csonka, LaDainian Tomlinson and Adrian Peterson are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Linebackers
programme.desc: Legendary linebackers come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Ray Lewis, Mike Singletary, Harry Carson, Willie Lanier, and Lawrence Taylor are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Defensive Backs
programme.desc: Legendary defensive backs come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Deion Sanders, Ronnie Lott, Charles Woodson, Darrell Green, Darrelle Revis and Rod Woodson are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Quarterbacks
programme.desc: Legendary quarterbacks come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Kurt Warner, John Elway, Jim Kelly, Joe Namath, Roger Staubach and Dan Fouts are featured.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New Orleans
programme.desc: Nate experiences the city's continued post-Katrina rebirth through some of its most iconic dining establishments, and witnesses the economic and opportunity struggles that still exist. The integration in the Superdome also takes center stage.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Cleveland
programme.desc: A local restaurateur guides Nate through the resurgent city as he explores a social-minded culinary school and the revitalization of a local high school football field. An exploration of second chances, working class struggle and community policing.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New York
programme.desc: A slam poet takes Nate to a special school that infuses music and scientific learning, and a Harlem barber fights gentrification with a unique entrepreneurial approach. Players from the Giants and Jets combat homelessness and inequality.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Miami
programme.desc: Nate joins a Miami Dolphin to explore police outreach in the community, and dives with military vets to examine an effort to save coral reefs. The long season's journey concludes at the site of Super Bowl LIV.

programme.title: A Football Life: Doug Williams
programme.desc: Doug Williams grew up with no running water in rural Louisiana during an era when few African Americans played quarterback. He would overcome adversity and prejudice to become a Heisman nominee, first round pick and Super Bowl MVP.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jerry Rice
programme.desc: 'A Football Life' chronicles the story of how an un-recruited small-town wide receiver became the greatest of all time.

programme.title: A Football Life: Michael Strahan
programme.desc: Strahan's story encompasses his time as the heart of the New York Giants championship defense and his new chapter as a broadcasting and talk show star.

programme.title: Top 10: HBCU Players
programme.desc: Count down the top ten players from historically black colleges and universities.

programme.title: Movie: Miracle
programme.desc: The true story of the 1980 U.S. Olympic hockey team who claimed victory over the Russians.

programme.title: Movie: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: A cyber-doctor finds parts of an abandoned cyborg with its human brain still intact in a trash heap, builds it a new body and treats it like a daughter, but when other cyborgs come to destroy her she finds that she possesses incredible fighting abilities.

programme.desc: An evil spirit haunts a doll.

programme.desc: A beleaguered small-business owner embarks on a romantic journey with a mysterious woman.

programme.title: The Making of: Mortal Engines
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at how a movie or show is made.

programme.title: Movie: Green Lantern
programme.desc: When a test pilot is given a magical ring, he inherits supernatural powers. With this ring comes the responsibility to become part of an interspatial battalion that is charged with creating peace among the universe.

programme.title: Movie: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: To her family's displeasure, a young girl falls in love with an orphaned woodcutter. The couple plans to run away together until they learn that her sister has been killed by a werewolf terrorizing their village.

programme.title: We Are the Dream: The Kids of the Oakland MLK Fest
programme.desc: Every year hundreds of children participate in the Oakland MLK Oratorical Festival, a stirring public speaking competition. This film follows students from schools across the city in the months leading up to the 40th annual festival as they rehearse.

programme.title: Movie: Tolkien
programme.desc: Author J.R.R. Tolkien discovers inspiration, love and friendship during his school years.

programme.title: Movie: The Island
programme.desc: Lincoln Six Echo and Jordan Two Delta are waiting to win the lottery so they can move to an island paradise. Shortly after Jordan wins the lottery, Lincoln discovers that they are actually clones and part of a sinister plot that must be stopped.

programme.title: Movie: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: The agency Monarch battles the monsters known as Titans.

programme.title: Movie: Ma
programme.desc: A lonely, middle-aged woman befriends teenagers and allows them to organize a party at her home. The teens think they couldn't have it any better, until strange occurrences start taking place that point to something being off with their host.

programme.title: The New Pope: The First Episode
programme.desc: With Pope Pius XIII in a coma, Cardinal Voiello makes an unpredictable move during the deadlocked papal conclave.

programme.title: The New Pope: The Second Episode
programme.desc: Voiello, Guiterrez, Assente, Aguirre and Sofia make a trip to the UK to appeal to the alluring but fragile Sir John Brannox.

programme.title: The New Pope: The Third Episode
programme.desc: Brannox reflects on his past before taking on the role of Supreme Pontiff; Ester meets a widower who offers a financial solution.

programme.title: Movie: The Town
programme.desc: While planning his next bank heist, a career criminal juggles his feelings for a bank manager from a previous robbery.

programme.title: Movie: Fast Five
programme.desc: The crew find themselves on the wrong side of the law again as they try to get out of Brazil.

programme.title: Movie: Tolkien
programme.desc: Author J.R.R. Tolkien discovers inspiration, love and friendship during his school years.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian John Oliver offers his satirical take on news, current events and politics.

programme.title: Movie: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: A team of bomb technicians with only a few days left on their tour of Iraq, struggle to control their reckless new sergeant. The new leader puts the excitement of urban combat ahead of the safety of his men, forcing them into deadly situations.

programme.title: Movie: The Others
programme.desc: A mother of two begins to suspect that the dark mansion they inhabit is actually haunted.

programme.title: Movie: Hail, Caesar!
programme.desc: A 1950's Hollywood fixer for a movie company cleans up after big names and stars in the industry, but must deal with more than fixing problems when a star disappears.

programme.title: McMillion$
programme.desc: Frank Colombo, the brother of Gennaro 'Jerry' Colombo, reveals the inner workings of the scam whereby 'Uncle Jerry' would sell the winning tickets to his brother for a premium, who would then find takes for the tickets in exchange for a cut of the prize.

programme.title: Movie: Seventh Son
programme.desc: The last remaining knight in a mystical order seeks out a prophesized hero, the seventh son of a seventh son, to fight a powerful witch bent on unleashing vengeance in a war between mankind and the supernatural.

programme.title: The Shop: Uninterrupted
programme.desc: Maverick Carter is joined by soccer player and trailblazing activist Megan Rapinoe, actor Whoopi Goldberg, WNBA superstar and basketball executive Sue Bird, politician Stacey Abrams, football player Malcolm Jenkins and actor Hasan Minhaj.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Former hitman John Wick, pursued by assassins after being excommunicated by the murder-for-hire underworld, attempts to have the bounty on his head removed.

programme.desc: Woman sues over fraudulent sale of cellphone and service fee; defendant claims it was her daughter who sold the phone. Then, a plaintiff sues over down payment for car and damages.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Molestation: All Signs Point to Grandma
programme.desc: Jasmine and Brian have agreed to co-parent their little boy, but someone is molesting him. Everyone is a suspect, even the child's grandmother, Ellie.

programme.title: Maury: You Son Is Not Biracial ... So There Is No Way I'm the Dad!
programme.desc: Jacqueline says Xavier fathered her son, but Xavier says she was pregnant before she met him. Adam says he's not the father of Canishia's son as there was another man with the baby at the hospital. Kentrail says Dinecia is a cheater and her son isn't his.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Sex Is My Thing
programme.desc: Solara has a sexy gift for her girlfriend Geneeva. The couple has been dating for six months and Solara wants to add a sexy surprise as a way to celebrate their anniversary.

programme.title: Movie: Hail, Caesar!
programme.desc: A 1950's Hollywood fixer for a movie company cleans up after big names and stars in the industry, but must deal with more than fixing problems when a star disappears.

programme.title: Movie: Flawless
programme.desc: A homophobic, retired security guard takes singing lessons from his drag queen neighbour to rehabilitate after suffering a stroke.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Baby on the Bus
programme.desc: Babysitting, Joey and Chandler take baby Ben out on the town to help them attract women, but they lose him on the bus.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: The Bitter Man and the Sea
programme.desc: Mike is forced to uninvite Carl to his anniversary cruise after Carl's nasty break-up with Victoria.

programme.title: Mom: A Catheter and a Dipsy-Doodle
programme.desc: Despite being extremely ill, Christy insists on taking her final exams. Also, Bonnie is furious when she suspects her boyfriend is cheating on her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Your Dismissive Attitude Toward Boobs
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan get into a power struggle when Alan allows Berta to stay at Charlie's house for a few days while her brother tries to wean himself off drugs at her place. Berta, who has an ulterior motive, plays one brother against the other.

programme.title: Black-ish: Under the Influence
programme.desc: Jack is going through an experimental phase and getting himself into trouble, so Dre chaperones the twins' school dance to keep an eye on him. Meanwhile, Junior fights with his girlfriend after she thinks he spends too much time taking care of Devante.

programme.title: Black-ish: Things Were Different Then
programme.desc: Dre reluctantly helps Junior plan Pops' 65th birthday party and starts to see his dad's past in a new light. Meanwhile, Bow decides to say "yes" to everything for a whole year and Jack and Diane take advantage of her.

programme.title: Charmed: Breaking the Cycle
programme.desc: Harry can't expel his past so The Charmed Ones rush to his aid but ultimately he makes a deal with the devil. As The Charmed Ones continue their efforts to restore the Power of Three, they find themselves in their gravest circumstances yet.

programme.title: Dynasty: You See Most Things in Terms of Black and White
programme.desc: Black and Cristal content with their new house guest. Adam seeks help from Alexis and Colby. Fallon plans a special gesture for Liam who gets a significant career opportunity. Sam tries a different kind of relationship. Kirby pines for her crush.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Loses His Insurance
programme.desc: Joey's health insurance expires due to lack of work and Ross keeps secrets from Rachel.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Cadillac
programme.desc: George's obsession with Marisa Tomei makes Susan suspicious. The only person who may keep Morty from impeachment in Florida turns out to be the woman from whom Jerry stole the marble rye.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Peggy Gets a Job
programme.desc: When Mike encourages his mom, Peggy, to get a job, he doesn't realize how it will interfere with Molly's life.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Why We Gave Up Women
programme.desc: When Alan suffers a minor heart attack, Charlie's ghost pays a visit to his hospital bedside.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Bill/ Murray
programme.desc: As Erica works on her application to Julliard, Adam and Beverly think she needs to do something big to stand out, so they decide to create a music video starring Erica. However, the music video does not go as Adam planned.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Other Smother
programme.desc: As Beverly networks for Barry and Erica at the college fair, she bumps into her nemesis, Betsy Rubenstone, who acts like she owns the place. Beverly aspires for her kids to be better than Betsy’s, so she has a plan up her sleeve for Barry.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the 10 Inches
programme.desc: When Max and Caroline need more space for their renovated dessert bar, they're willing to do just about anything to convince Angie, the brash owner of the pizza place next door, to rent them her back office.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: The After the Wedding Night Episode
programme.desc: Chardonnay goes on an emotional rollercoaster ride after getting jilted at the altar. Kelly rebuffs Jason's declaration of love and tries to make amends with Chardonnay. Jason is torn between both women.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Odd Couple Out
programme.desc: When Vanessa finds out that she and Mike weren't invited to a neighbour's party, she blames Mike for not trying hard enough to be pleasant in social situations.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: The Wilds
programme.desc: Jack visits The Wilds in southwestern Ohio, home to a variety of species from Africa, Asia and North America. He encounters rare creatures like the takin, Asian one-horned rhino, white rhino, cheetah, and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Exploring El Valle
programme.desc: Jack explores El Valle, a volcanic valley in Panama, and encounters rare amphibians including the endangered Panamanian golden frog. Jack then visits a cacao plantation where he learns to harvest cacao.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Okavango Delta
programme.desc: Jack explores the waters of the Okavango Delta in Botswana. It is the largest inland delta in the world, and is home to crocodiles, hippos, and elephants. Then, Jack explores the surrounding landscape and encounters wild dogs and leopards.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Getting to Level
programme.desc: Tom shows Kevin the new floor plan on the Arlington project, explains the system he devised to ensure a flat ceiling in the newly expanded kitchen, and works with a mason to level out the existing concrete floor.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Prime Mates
programme.desc: A kid conservationist meets and studies primates at a wildlife sanctuary, and a family picks out a pup on adoption day.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Thermal Image Cameras
programme.desc: Alie shows us the chef using science to add to your dining experience, the wrist band that relieves stress, heat imaging device for your smartphone, and the alarm clock rug getting you out of bed.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Raw Travel: Timeless Northern Ethiopia
programme.desc: Viewers are encouraged to break out the passport and explore cultures around the world.

programme.title: Wipeout: Rats

programme.desc: Fish batter-up, the Wheel of Misfortune, Polly want a diaper?
